title: Timeless and Classics Guns
description:
Timeless and Classics Guns is a gun mod for Minecraft (1.16.5 and 1.18.2) created by Timeless Squad and creator NekoCrane.
 ** This mod uses some of the architecture of Mrcrayfish's guns **
body:
# Timeless and Classics Guns
Timeless and Classics Guns is a gun mod for Minecraft (1.16.5 and 1.18.2) created by Timeless Squad and creator NekoCrane.

## Intro
** This mod uses some of the architecture of Mrcrayfish's guns **

** Many guns and accessories with elaborate models and animations have been added, each with its unique animations and attributes **

** The mod supports data packets for weapon customization, modifying values such as damage/recoil/projectile capacity/rate of fire/formula/accessory attributes **

** You can add homemade add-ons based on this mod **

** Timeless and Classics already exist as standalone mods, with many new features added **

## Attention
If you experience issues like memory crashes when using version 0.3.11 or below, replace it with 0.3.12 or remove the "gunskin" file from 
```
assets/tac/texture
```
by yourself. We will optimize this aspect in the next release. **TaC for 1.18.2 (version 0.3.10.2) is a beta version, so there may be unpredictable bugs, please install at your own risk**

## Others
① After the 0.1.0 BETA release, TaC has become a standalone mod, no longer an add-on package to CGM, and it has also announced that it will stop relying on CGM (Obfuscate is required as a prefix).

② Use mouse Settings to switch aiming modes, and forbid right-clicking interactive objects.

③ In TaC 0.3.8.1 and above, if you keep getting killed by yourself with a gun, change "bulletSelfHarm" to false in the "config\tac-common.toml" file to fix the problem, the effect is shown below.

![Where to change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e71a96accd437999ff66780a2bf5f4b4d3cc1937.png)

④ Compatible with Yes, Steve model mod with unique third-person animation!

![TaC X YSM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f309f8f2c3d82fda268f8967a3456ba95583f603.png)

## Support
Support our work CN [Afdian](https://afdian.net/a/nekocrane) (Main operating platform for now).

## Installation Help
**REQUIRES**(mandatory): The mod Obfuscate (or Framework for MC 1.18.2) before playing any TaC version, preferably the latest version!

## Related Links
**Dependency:**

[obfuscate](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obfuscate) on the 1.16.5 game version.

[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) on the 1.18.2 game version.

**Linkage:**

[Yes Steve Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/yes-steve-model) on 1.16.5 & 1.18.2 game versions.

**Community add-ons:**

[TaC-Reforged: LesRaisins Append Pack](https://modrinth.com/mod/lesraisins-weapon) on the 1.16.5 game version.

[Customize interactive keys add-on](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tac-interact-key) on 1.16.5 & 1.18.2 game versions.

[Better third-person shooting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/third-person-shooting) on the 1.18.2 game version.

[Apotheosis Modern Ragnarok](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis-modern-ragnarok) on the 1.18.2 game version.

# Guns, animated, realistic, fun, made the Timeless way
**50+ guns, all with their performance, tier, models, and customization**

![Graph guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f6e835275d1eedadfd4030562fadf18d64adedc.png)

**Attachments, modify your weapon with a wide range of scope, muzzle, magazine, grip, and stock...**

![Graph attachments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3255381681a9dfa3ce4d390459c346b3bbb775b5.png)

**Skins, change your weapon's color and model**

![Graph skins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0f797eb523b21ce4632cdbb5b950915cb8cd71e.png)

**Customizability, Various data of weapons can be changed via local/server datapack, and their appearance and sound can be changed via resourcepack**

![Graph customizability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd9fc83f3ecdd5ed6847fb09ac1efa414933cbd0.png)
